200.description: API health status for launch and smoke checks.

200.description: Updated candidate request status, assignment, or officer note.

200.description: Verified provider login resolved to the local JP2 current user.

200.description: Local session state was cleared.
The current provider-backed session is still valid.

403.description: The authenticated user is inactive or archived.
